titleStmt.title: SII 24.377: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 377. (A.R. No. 258 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records the gift of the village Taṇḍaṅkuṟai as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam for offerings to the deity and for running the Rāmānujakūṭam and the tiruttōppuk-kaṭṭaḷai instituted by Kandāḍai Rāmānuja Aiyaṅgār, by Timmarasaiyaṉ, the Pradhāni of the king. The date of the record viz., Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Karkaṭaka, śu. pañchamī, Wednesday, Uttiram corresponds regularly to 1524, A.D. July 6. Wednesday; ·05; ·31.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 6ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa dhāruṇasamvatsarattu karkkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum budhavāramu
m peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakṛṣṇadevamahārāyar pradhāni timmarasai
yyaṉukkup poliūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi perumāḷukkut tam muṭaiya Avasarakkaṭṭaḷai naṭattukai
kku tām tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭa taṇṭaṅkuṟai grāmam Oṉṟukku ṉāṟpāṟkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa sakalādāyamum śrībhaṇḍāra
ttile kaṇṭu koṇṭu perumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai Oṉṟukku kaṭṭaḷai tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl Amutupaṭi patakku paruppamutu
Uḻakku neyyamutu Uḻakku ṉālu kaṟiyamutu teṅkāy paḻavamutu karuppukkaṭṭi sambhāram Erikarumpu Uḷpaṭa Intak kaṭṭaḷaiyil tammuṭaiya Avasaramāka
nāḷ toṟum nālu taḷikai naivedyam Amutu ceytaruḷi viṭṭa viḻukkāṭu ṉālil Oṉṟukku Oru taḷikai prasādamum kan(ta)tāṭai Irāmāṉūjayyaṅkār I
rāmānuja kūṭṭattukkum nammuṭaiya perāle kantāṭai Irāmanujayyaṅkār ceyvi kkiṟa tiruttoppuk kaṭṭaḷaikkum Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāka na
ṭakka kaṭavatākavum . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanādacyutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 24.377 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
